text: Standing in front of the glass doors, I feel a sense of anticipation—about to cross from a sterile, well-lit corridor into a vibrant, intellectual space. The cool, modern aesthetics invite introspection and curiosity. Stepping through, I am greeted by the bold text "R+D" and colorful patterns that proclaim the unity of research and development, a dance between creativity and logic. I feel inspired, as if pausing in the foyer of innovation itself, aware of my own role as both an observer and a participant in this unfolding story of human ingenuity.
